Regions of Africa

North, West, East, Central & Southern Africa

Browse all five regions, compare countries, and jump directly to destinations, tours, and local experiences.

5 Regions
21 Countries
Reset
Showing 5 regions
4 countries

North Africa

Golden dunes, imperial medinas, and ancient caravan routes from Morocco to Egypt.

Countries in this region

  • Morocco
  • Egypt
  • Tunisia
  • Algeria
Explore North Africa →
4 countries

West Africa

Atlantic coastlines, vibrant music, sacred forests, and warm community-led experiences.

Countries in this region

  • Senegal
  • Ghana
  • Nigeria
  • Sierra Leone
Explore West Africa →
4 countries

East Africa

World-class wildlife migrations, great rift valleys, and iconic savanna horizons.

Countries in this region

  • Kenya
  • Tanzania
  • Uganda
  • Ethiopia
Explore East Africa →
4 countries

Central Africa

Rainforest expeditions, gorilla tracking, and deeply rooted indigenous traditions.

Countries in this region

  • Rwanda
  • Cameroon
  • Gabon
  • DR Congo
Explore Central Africa →
5 countries

Southern Africa

Big-five safaris, dramatic waterfalls, wine valleys, and desert-meets-ocean road trips.

Countries in this region

  • South Africa
  • Botswana
  • Namibia
  • Zimbabwe
  • Zambia
Explore Southern Africa →
